p.span: in the capacity as Notary acting as a Public Official in
, hereinafter referred to as: the Notary, at the request of the appearer named below to be stated in this deed :
, holder of an identity card with the population identification number
The appearer hereby declares and states, as follows
hat the appearer intends to make a will,
and for that purpose declares his/her last will (uiterste wil) briefly but
firmly to the Notary, and the intended will
is located on the said land, locally known
-If the said Certificate is upgraded into a Freehold Title (Hak Milik), then (the Number
of the Title and/or the Measurement Letter/Situation Drawing issued by the competent authority) shall be an
above has become a Foreign Citizen, then the share o
shall be replaced with money by transferring his/her share
at a fair price value by and among
the aforementioned interested Legatees, so that the share of the said Foreign Citizen shall pass to the one who makes the payment.
If it is the will of God Almighty, among
mentioned above passes away before me, then the one who
shall be transferred (without any replacement whatsoever) to the aforementioned Legatees
above who are still living, the distribution of which shall be made proportionally.
I appoint as the Executor of my will, namely :
, mentioned above, both jointly and severally, granting to him/her all rights and powers that may be granted by Law
to an Executor of a will, especially the right
to hold my estate, all with the right of substitution.
message and entrust to my heirs, as follows :
-any problem or dispute that may arise in the future shall be settled properly through deliberation
in a family manner to reach consensus,
do good and help one another, keep away from feelings
of envy and spite among you all, and
all of you sincerely and wholeheartedly accept,
obey and uphold as well as
carry out all of my wishes stated in this will deed.
Before this deed was read out by the Notary, the appearer was requested to restate his/her last will to the Notary, briefly.
After that request was fulfilled by the appearer, then
this deed was read out by the Notary to the appearer, and afterwards the Notary asked him/her whether
what was read out contained his/her last will
and to that question the appearer answered that what
was read out did indeed contain his/her last will.
- The reading, the question, and the answer were all done in the presence of the witnesses;
- The appearer is known to me, the Notary
he appearer, acting as stated above, declares :
-that if in the future there arises any dispute or conflict or report concerning this deed or any other party regarding everything that
is related to this deed and/or the follow-up
to this deed, then it shall
release the Notary as a Public Official
as well as the related officials and
witnesses from any legal claim/lawsuit and/or
civil, state administrative, or criminal, including but not limited to claims
or lawyer, and hereby grants power to the Notary and/or the related officials and witnesses, to and
behalf of the appearer to withdraw the aforementioned claim/lawsuit and/or report at the competent authority or the attorney or lawyer, with no exception whatsoever.
-that if in the issuance of a copy/quotation/extract of the minute of this deed (authentic deed) there is
an error or typographical mistake, then the Notary shall make a correction of the typographical error
in accordance with the minute of the deed (its authentic deed).
-Made as a minute and executed in
outh Jakarta on the day, date, and at the time stated in the heading of this deed,
, holder of an identity card with the population identification number
-Both are employees of the Notary office whom I,
